---
title: "Charlotte Alington Barnard"
---

## Charlotte Alington Barnard

**Dates:** (1830-1869)

**Maiden name:** (Pye)

### Description

composer and poet under the name 'Claribel', contributor to <i>MP</i> (1869)

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 18th [1869]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
